'''Khakraim''' was a member of [[Clan Hakh'khar]] who had been transplanted to [[Wayland/Legends|Wayland]]. He was attached to the [[New Republic Intelligence Service|NRI]] safe house in [[New Nystao]].

{{Char-stub}}
